# Supported Countries

Acme Shop provides international shipping to a wide array of countries, allowing customers worldwide to access their products. To check if shipping is available to a specific location, customers can enter their address during the checkout process. Shipping fees and delivery times differ by destination and may include additional customs fees, which are not covered by Acme Shop. The company also notes that certain regions may experience temporary unavailability of shipping due to logistical issues or external factors, encouraging customers to stay informed through their website or newsletter.

[Source: international_shipping.md#supported-countries]
